016package org.consensusj.jsonrpc;
017
018import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonCreator;
019import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonInclude;
020import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonProperty;
021import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.annotation.JsonSerialize;
022import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.NullNode;
023import org.consensusj.jsonrpc.internal.NumberStringSerializer;
024import org.jspecify.annotations.Nullable;
025import org.slf4j.Logger;
026import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;
027
028/**
029 * JSON-RPC Response POJO
030 * <p>
031 * Note that {@code result} is a parameterized type and can be used to directly map JSON-RPC results
032 * to the correct type for each method.
033 * @param <RSLT> The type of the JSON-RPC {@code result}.
034 */
035public class JsonRpcResponse<RSLT> {
036    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(JsonRpcResponse.class);
037    private final String          jsonrpc;   // version
038    private final String          id;
039    @Nullable
040    private final RSLT            result;
041    @Nullable
042    private final JsonRpcError    error;
043
044    @JsonCreator
045    public JsonRpcResponse(@JsonProperty("jsonrpc")  String jsonrpc,
046                            @JsonProperty("id")      String id,
047                            @Nullable @JsonProperty("result")  RSLT result,
048                            @Nullable @JsonProperty("error")   JsonRpcError error) {
049        if ((error == null && result == null) ||
050            (error != null && result != null && !(result instanceof NullNode))) {
051            log.warn("non-compliant response: (error, result) both null or both set.");
052        }
053        this.jsonrpc = jsonrpc;
054        this.id = id;
055        this.result = result;
056        this.error = error;
057    }
058
059    public JsonRpcResponse(JsonRpcRequest request,
060                           RSLT result) {
061        this.jsonrpc = request.getJsonrpc();
062        this.id = request.getId();
063        this.result = result;
064        this.error = null;
065    }
066
067    public JsonRpcResponse(JsonRpcRequest request,
068                           JsonRpcError error) {
069        this.jsonrpc = request.getJsonrpc();
070        this.id = request.getId();
071        this.error = error;
072        this.result = null;
073    }
074
075    @JsonInclude(JsonInclude.Include.NON_NULL)
076    public String getJsonrpc() {
077        return jsonrpc;
078    }
079
080    @JsonInclude(JsonInclude.Include.NON_NULL)
081    @Nullable
082    public RSLT getResult() {
083        return result;
084    }
085
086    @JsonInclude(JsonInclude.Include.NON_NULL)
087    @Nullable
088    public JsonRpcError getError() {
089        return error;
090    }
091
092    @JsonSerialize(using= NumberStringSerializer.class)
093    public String getId() {
094        return id;
095    }
096
097    // TODO: Add .toString() method for logging
098}
